## Workflow

What were you trying to do?

## Install friction

Where did setup or environment configuration slow you down?

## Config friction

What part of the tabular mapping or command flow was unclear?

## Trust-score interpretation

Which reason codes or score changes felt surprising?

## Artifacts

If you can share them safely, include:

- CLI output
- `batch_summary.json` / `compare.json` / `export_summary.json`
- redacted report screenshots
